title: The Drill Head Breaks Again
description: Pages 1–4 focus on the drill head breaks again, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Fighters, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as luffy’s battle with Chinjao reaches its peak, proving his strength and reshaping Chinjao’s hatred into recognition.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He's just not letting up with these attacks!! What's happened, all of a sudden?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: An all-out bravul!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Kelly Funk, the assassin from the Mogaro Kingdom, sure is strong!!! Fighters are being blown away like so many pieces of paper!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: BOO!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Sai...!! pay back that brat for the pain he's caused boo!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: It's the white-hot C-block!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Looks like we're get- Ting to the climax of this fierce battle!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What did I just see!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Those two guys ...became one!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: hurry up and wear me, Bobby !!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Jyake Jayake

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Huh!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How ill- fitting, that this naturally tough-as-nails body...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Would be paired with Bobby's weak demeanor!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But with this "transformative skin," I can hi- jack his perso- nality ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: And my fighting sense and ferocity ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: CAN BE FULLY UTILIZED

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Even in this body!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I ate the jyake jyake no mi and became a jacket man!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Whether animals or even monsters, I can control whatever wears me

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...ah... and after that, it was over in an instant

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: 01, Have you understood yet!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We brothers are assessing for hire who combine our power

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You're the pathetic elder Brother from Kanokun!! You didn't even protect your little brother!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Little Brother's Training...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: was insufficient

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Harsh ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: VA-VA-VA-VA-VIOLENCE!!! VA-VA-VA-VA-VA-VA-VA-VA-VA-VA-VA-VA-VA-VA-VA-VA-VA-VA-VA-VA-VA-VA-VA-VA-VA-VA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So just how strong is Kanokuni's KenPo!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: From the moment we became pupils of hasshoken

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: RID MYSELF OF ANY PARTICULAR AFINITY FOR MY BROTHER
